title: You-config schema
description: Look up the live You operator and system configuration JSON Schema—definitions, fields, constraints, defaults, enums, and examples—on a stable deep-linkable docs route.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: This reference shows the live You operator and system configuration JSON Schema from the you-agent-factory API package. Use it to look up definitions, fields, constraints, defaults, enums, and examples for operator and system config. Field and definition descriptions come from the package schema itself.

schemaLookup.title: Schema Lookup
schemaLookup.body: Browse the complete You-config schema below. Filter by definition or field name, follow $ref links to related definitions, and copy deep links to any definition or field anchor on this page.

howToUse.title: How To Use
howToUse.body: Start from the root You configuration object, then open nested definitions when a field points at another schema. Use the filter to find a field or definition by name. Copy a deep link when you need to share a stable pointer into this page. Contract text on fields and definitions stays in the package schema language even when the page chrome is localized.

limitsAndAssumptions.title: Limits And Assumptions
limitsAndAssumptions.body: This page covers the You operator and system configuration package schema only. It is not the Factory schema, the mock-workers schema, or authored Worker documentation. If the schema cannot be loaded, the lookup surface shows an explicit unavailable state instead of an empty page.
